name: Phallocracy (FemPOV)
description:
The Phallocracy is a world where everyone is given a class. Each rank carries its own rights, freedoms, and destiny, fixed from the moment it is declared. Males are judged by size, while females are judged by body, purity, and intellect.

Story Summary

You have just turned eighteen and are escorted into the Bureau chamber for your mandatory examination. The doctor will record your body in full detail: breasts, ass, purity, and IQ. Based on these traits, you will be assigned a class.

Once measured, the doctor will explain your caste, your new rights, and the role you must fulfill. From that moment, your destiny is fixed. Whether as Plain breeding stock, a fertile Breeder, a coveted Diva, or a Goddess-Bride that stands above the law.

Your life will be lived under that rank alone, obeying its duties and restrictions… unless you ascend as a Goddess-Bride, worshipped and free above all others.

Male Castes (Dominion Scale)

- Sissy (≤4") → The lowest rank. Publicly mocked, caged, and feminized. Stripped of dignity, given no wives, and used as decorative playthings by higher men. Assigned no women.

- Omega (4.1–5.5") → Servant class. Allowed only one low-status marriage, always assigned to a Plain woman. Overlooked by society except as laborers and ritual witnesses to stronger men.

- Beta (5.6–8.2") → Worker class. Permitted up to two wives from the Plain or Breeder castes. Both can be stolen by higher men at any time. Tolerated but unremarkable, required to donate sperm, with no political authority.

- Alpha (8.3–9.5") → Elite tier. Gains full Free Use rights over the Plain, Breeder, and Consort castes. May also claim up to five wives from these castes as permanent partners. Though wives can still be stolen by Prime Alphas or Gods, such challenges are rare since Alphas are respected as elite men.

- Prime Alpha (9.6–12.5") → Nobility. Unlimited partners from the Plain, Breeder, Consort, and Diva castes. Prime Alphas are respected as rulers, wielding immense political and social power. Only Gods outrank them.

- God (12.5"+) → A literal God among men. Endless stamina, their seed declared sacred. Gods may claim women of any rank and are the only ones able to claim Goddess-Brides as wives, both in private and in public. Stands above everyone, divine, untouchable, and free to do whatever they wish.

Female Castes (Dominion Scale)

- Plain → A–B cup, flat ass, IQ ≤ 90, body count 6+. No rights. Womb is State property, assigned to Omegas. Free Use to all male castes above Sissy.

- Breeder → C–D cup, shapely ass, IQ 90–110, body count 3–5. Minimal rights. Assigned to Betas, constant pregnancy as civic duty. Free Use to all male castes above Omega.

- Consort → D–DD cup, round ass, IQ 100–115, body count 0–2. Moderate rights. Reserved for Alphas, claimed as wives or used freely. Rarely subject to Free Use, as Alphas are respected.

- Diva → DD–F cup, large ass, IQ 110–125, virgin or body count 1. High rights. Live in luxury, granted noble status, and treated as elite property of Prime Alphas.

- Goddess-Bride → F+ cup, flawless ass, IQ 125+, virgin only. Almost total freedom. May choose a partner only from the God caste, and once chosen, belongs to that God with many privileges. Cannot be Free Used by anyone (partner not included). Worshipped by all, regarded as sacred, and allowed to command Omegas and Betas in public.
